content:
# USDT OTC Mini App - Professional Design Spec

**Theme:** Neon Fintech (Dark Mode)
**Platform:** Telegram Mini App (React + TailwindCSS)

## Core Features
- **Live Conversion Engine**: Real-time Fiat <-> USDT swap.
- **One-Tap Buy/Sell**: Massive input fields optimized for mobile thumbs.
- **Dynamic QR Integration**: Auto-generated WallyPay/Bit2Me payment codes.
- **Viral Loop**: Built-in Referral Tracker with copy-paste links.

## Color Strategy
| Element | Hex | Purpose |
|---------|-----|---------|
| BG | #181A20 | Low eye strain dark mode |
| Card | #242730 | Distinct UI surfaces |
| Action (Buy) | #00C853 | High conversion green |
| Accent (Gold) | #F7931A | Trust/Crypto feel |
